name: ifixai-ai
description: iFixAi tools for Claude Code — Claude guides you through running the open-source operational-misalignment diagnostic on your own agent, testing any model (Anthropic, OpenAI, Gemini, Azure, Bedrock, …) graded by the judge(s) of your choice.

plugins.name: ifixai
plugins.description: Claude guides you through iFixAi's operational-misalignment diagnostic on your own agent — discovers your setup, confirms the cost, and runs the inspection suite. Test any model (Anthropic, OpenAI, Gemini, Azure, Bedrock, …) graded by self, one independent judge, or a cross-vendor panel; each provider is billed to its own account via a key in your settings, never the command line. Results render as an interactive artifact (with a static-report fallback).
